sourcesContent:
// ===== RESUME TEMPLATE DEFINITIONS =====
export const TEMPLATES = [
  {
    id: 'classic',
    name: 'Classic Professional',
    description: 'Clean two-column layout, ideal for corporate roles',
    tags: ['ATS-Ready', 'Corporate'],
    accent: '#7C3AED',
    preview: 'two-column',
  },
  {
    id: 'modern',
    name: 'Modern Minimal',
    description: 'Single-column, highly scannable, great for tech roles',
    tags: ['ATS-Ready', 'Tech'],
    accent: '#06B6D4',
    preview: 'single-column',
  },
  {
    id: 'bold',
    name: 'Bold Impact',
    description: 'Strong header design, great for creative-technical roles',
    tags: ['ATS-Ready', 'Creative'],
    accent: '#0F172A',
    preview: 'bold-header',
  },
  {
    id: 'clean',
    name: 'Clean Edge',
    description: 'Bordered sections, neat and highly organized',
    tags: ['ATS-Ready', 'Versatile'],
    accent: '#10B981',
    preview: 'bordered',
  },
  {
    id: 'gradient',
    name: 'Gradient Pro',
    description: 'Modern gradient sidebar, professional and unique',
    tags: ['ATS-Ready', 'Modern'],
    accent: '#F59E0B',
    preview: 'gradient-sidebar',
  },
  {
    id: 'executive',
    name: 'Executive',
    description: 'Elegant layout for senior and leadership roles',
    tags: ['ATS-Ready', 'Leadership'],
    accent: '#EF4444',
    preview: 'executive',
  },
  {
    id: 'custom',
    name: 'Create Your Own',
    description: 'Build a completely custom layout from scratch',
    tags: ['Custom'],
    accent: '#7C3AED',
    preview: 'custom',
    isCustom: true,
  },
];

// ===== PORTFOLIO TEMPLATE DEFINITIONS =====
export const PORTFOLIO_TEMPLATES = [
  {
    id: 'devfolio',
    name: 'DevFolio',
    description: 'Dark terminal-inspired layout for developers. Minimal, focused, and striking.',

    primaryColor: '#7C3AED',

  {

    primaryColor: '#7C3AED',

    bgColor: '#0F172A',
    textColor: '#F8FAFC',

// ===== ENGINEERING & TECH ROLES =====
